app.title: CodeAgora
app.subtitle: Multi-LLM Code Review
doctor.title: System Health Check
doctor.live.title: Live API Check
init.ciHint:
Add {key} to your repository secrets:
   Settings → Secrets → Actions → New repository secret
providers.title: Supported Providers
sessions.title: Review Sessions
sessions.empty: No review sessions found. Run 'agora review' to start.
error.configHint: Run 'agora init' to create a config file.
error.apiKeyHint: Check 'agora providers' for required API keys.
error.doctorHint: Run 'agora doctor' to check your setup.
error.pathHint: Check the file path and try again.
statusbar.reviewSetup: Enter: next | Esc: back | q: home
statusbar.results: j/k: scroll | Enter: detail | Esc: back | q: home
statusbar.sessions: j/k: scroll | Enter: detail | f: filter | q: home
statusbar.config: Tab: switch tab | j/k: navigate | q: home
statusbar.context: Tab: files | j/k: scroll | c: collapse | Enter: detail | q: back
config.tabs.head: Head
config.noConfig: No config found. Apply a preset to get started.
config.help.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
config.detail.title: Details
config.reviewer.noReviewers: No reviewers. Press {key} to add one.
config.reviewer.declarativeHint: Edit .ca/config.json directly to change declarative settings.
config.edit.hints: Tab: next field  Enter: save  Esc: cancel
config.model.placeholder: Type model or Enter to browse
config.apiKeys.enterHints: Enter: set key  h: health check  t: test all  Esc: back
config.apiKeys.retryHints: r: retry  Enter/Esc: back to providers
context.title: Diff Context
review.setup.continueHint: Press Enter to continue, Esc to go back
review.setup.noConfig: No config found. Run 'agora init' first.
review.setup.escBack: Press Esc or 'b' to go back
review.setup.navHint: Up/Down to select, Space to toggle, Enter to continue, b to go back
review.setup.startHint: Press Enter to start, b/Esc to go back
model.selector.title: Select Model
model.selector.tip: Tip: type "groq/" to filter by provider
model.selector.noMatch: No models match. Try a different search or check model-rankings.json.
model.selector.hints: {check}=key set  {cross}=no key  |  ↑↓ scroll  Enter select  Type to search  Esc cancel
help.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
cli.review.noInput: No diff input. Pipe a diff or provide a file path.
cli.config.notFound: Config not found. Run '{cmd} init' first.
cli.init.noKeys: No API keys found. Groq offers a free tier — get started at https://console.groq.com
cli.error.apiKey: API key not set for provider: {provider}
cli.status.title: CodeAgora Status
cli.providers.test.title: Provider Status
cli.staged.empty: No staged changes. Stage files with 'git add' first.
cli.error.gitStagedFailed: Failed to run 'git diff --staged'. Are you in a git repository?
cli.error.prFormat: --pr must be a GitHub PR URL or a number
cli.error.diffPathRequired: diff-path required (or pipe via stdin, or use --pr)
cli.info.cacheHit: Cache hit — returning previous review result. Use --no-cache for a fresh review.
cli.error.runInitFirst: Config file not found. Run "{cmd} init" first.
cli.error.yamlNotSupported: YAML config editing is not yet supported. Use .ca/config.json.
cli.error.sessionIdFormat: Session ID must be in YYYY-MM-DD/NNN format
cli.error.invalidSessionIdFormat: Invalid session ID format. Expected: YYYY-MM-DD/NNN
desktop.confirm.cancelReview: Cancel the running review? Ongoing progress will be lost.
desktop.confirm.discardUnsavedConfig: You have unsaved config changes. Discard them and switch repository?
desktop.notice.yamlReadOnly: YAML configs are read-only in Desktop. Convert to .ca/config.json to edit here.
desktop.notice.yamlSaveBlocked: YAML configs cannot be saved from Desktop. Convert this config to .ca/config.json first.
desktop.notice.startingWorkingTree: Starting review for all local changes...
desktop.notice.reviewResultMissing: The review finished, but no result session was found. Refresh evidence.
desktop.error.renderTitle: Desktop view recovered from a render error
desktop.error.renderBody: Refresh the view or switch sections. The app kept the error local so your repository files were not changed.
desktop.repo.fact.head: Head
desktop.sessions.filterPlaceholder: Filter verdicts, files, or session ids
desktop.sessions.emptyTitle: No reviews have landed here yet.
desktop.sessions.emptyBody: Run a review to create the first local evidence bundle.
desktop.sessions.noFilterMatch: No sessions match the current filter.
desktop.cockpit.readyTitle: Ready to create the first verdict
desktop.cockpit.readyBody: CodeAgora will collect model findings, debate evidence, and final verdicts into local sessions.
desktop.cockpit.nextActionBody: Follow the primary action, then return here to compare the next review result.
desktop.cockpit.status.runningTitle: A review is already checking this branch
desktop.cockpit.status.runningBody: The activity timeline is updating as reviewers finish their work.
desktop.cockpit.status.noReviewTitle: Start with the changes prepared for review
desktop.cockpit.status.noReviewBody: Run a private-preview review to collect findings, evidence, and a final recommendation.
desktop.cockpit.status.acceptTitle: No blocking findings in the latest review
desktop.cockpit.status.acceptBody: The latest review did not find blockers. Keep the evidence with your normal merge checklist.
desktop.cockpit.status.rejectBody: Fix the blocking findings, then rerun review on the changes you plan to commit.
desktop.cockpit.status.needsHumanTitle: A person should make the final call
desktop.cockpit.status.needsHumanBody: Some findings need human judgment before this branch moves forward.
desktop.detail.emptyTitle: Select a session to inspect the verdict.
desktop.detail.emptyBody: The detail view highlights the final decision, blocker severity, debate artifacts, and exportable evidence.
desktop.detail.noFindings: No findings recorded. This session is ready to archive or share.
desktop.acceptance.acceptBody: No blocking findings are left in this session. Keep the decision summary with the normal merge record.
desktop.acceptance.rejectBody: Resolve blockers first, rerun the review, then accept the next clean result.
desktop.acceptance.humanBody: Use the evidence package to make the final call before this branch moves forward.
desktop.acceptance.pendingTitle: Decision is not ready to accept
desktop.acceptance.pendingBody: Review the status and evidence before recording a team decision.
desktop.run.title: Create a review result
desktop.run.body: Choose what should be checked, watch the review progress, then return to the cockpit for the final decision.
desktop.run.stagedBody: Use this when you already chose the files that should go into the next commit or PR.
desktop.run.workingBody: Use this when you want CodeAgora to inspect every local edit before you decide what to commit.
desktop.run.noActiveTitle: No review is running right now.
desktop.run.noActiveBody: Start a review above to see progress, result creation, and final status here.
desktop.run.outcomeFailedBody: Check setup or local tool status, then run the same review scope again.
desktop.run.outcomeCancelledBody: Your changed files are still in place. Run the same scope again when ready.
desktop.run.outcomeMissingBody: The review ended, but Desktop could not connect it to a result session. Refresh evidence, then check the latest result.
desktop.config.title: Review settings
desktop.config.body: Review the current workspace policy and launch readiness.
desktop.config.notValidated: Config has not been validated yet.
desktop.config.statusReadyTitle: This setup can run a review
desktop.config.statusReadyBody: Workspace and policy checks are ready. Choose a change scope to create a review result.
desktop.config.statusBlockedTitle: Fix settings before running a review
desktop.config.statusBlockedBody: Resolve the errors below, then check status again.
desktop.config.yamlReadOnlyBanner: This repository uses a YAML config. Desktop can read and validate it, but saving is disabled. Convert it to .ca/config.json to edit from Desktop.
desktop.setup.title: Review launch readiness
desktop.setup.body: Check whether local review, PR automation, and result evidence are ready.
desktop.setup.localReviewReadyBody: A review engine connection was detected. This app can create review results.
desktop.setup.localReviewOptionalBody: Connections stay optional until selected by the review policy.
desktop.setup.prAutomationReadyBody: A workflow is ready to run CodeAgora review on pull requests.
desktop.setup.prAutomationMissingBody: Connect a workflow when PR automation is needed. Local review remains available.
desktop.setup.resultEvidenceReadyBody: Files for release and verification evidence are ready.
desktop.setup.resultEvidenceMissingBody: Evidence files are not fully prepared yet. Add them when audit tracking is needed.
desktop.setup.providerHint: Add these variables to your shell profile or project .env file
desktop.setup.providerStatusNotLoaded: Provider status has not been loaded yet.
desktop.setup.providerStatusHint: Refresh setup to detect configured API keys and local CLI tools.
desktop.setup.mcpNotLoaded: MCP status has not been loaded yet.
desktop.setup.githubActionNotLoaded: GitHub Action status has not been loaded yet.
desktop.setup.workflowSummary: {codeagora} CodeAgora workflow(s) found across {workflows} workflow file(s).
desktop.setup.evidenceNotLoaded: Evidence status has not been loaded yet.
desktop.readiness.readyBody: Workspace trust, git context, and current config are ready for a private-preview run.
desktop.readiness.blockedBody: Resolve these items first, then start a review from this screen.
desktop.readiness.reason.notGitRepo: Selected path is not a git repository.
desktop.readiness.reason.configMissing: CodeAgora config file was not found in this workspace.
desktop.readiness.reason.configInvalid: Current config validation is failing. Fix config before launch.
desktop.degraded.title: Degraded run signal
desktop.degraded.runBody: Some run events indicate degraded execution. Review timeline details and session evidence before acting.
desktop.degraded.sessionBody: This session includes degraded execution signals. Treat findings as partial evidence and rerun after fixes if needed.
desktop.detail.exportGuidance: Export this verdict bundle for PR context, teammate handoff, or release evidence tracking.
desktop.next.title: What to do next
desktop.next.fixBlockers: Fix the blocking findings first in your branch.
desktop.next.rerunStaged: Run another review on commit-ready changes to confirm blockers are resolved.
desktop.next.exportShare: Copy Markdown/JSON/SARIF and attach it to your PR or team handoff.
desktop.next.humanReview: Escalate contested findings to a human reviewer.
desktop.next.captureDecision: Record the final merge decision in your normal team workflow.
desktop.next.prepareMerge: Proceed with your normal merge checklist.
desktop.next.exportRecord: Export the session result to keep a review evidence record.
desktop.next.monitorNextRun: Monitor the next run after new changes to keep evidence fresh.
desktop.next.privatePreviewNote: Desktop guidance is private-preview only and follows existing CodeAgora CLI/session semantics.
